pull_request.title: Update python versions
pull_request.body:
- Add support for Python 3.14
- Remove support for Python 3.9
- Update necessary dependencies and project configuration

changed_files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ defaults:
 
 jobs:
   check:
-    name: Run checks for periodicity-detection on ubuntu with python 3.9
+    name: Run checks for periodicity-detection
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
@@ -23,14 +23,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           use-mamba: true
           auto-update-conda: true
-          python-version: "3.9"
+          python-version: "3.10"
           channels: "defaults"
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |
-          pip install -r requirements.dev
+          pip install ".[dev]"
       - name: Typcheck with mypy
         run: |
-          python setup.py typecheck
+          mypy periodicity_detection tests
       - name: Lint with flake8
         run: |
           flake8 . --count --show-source --statistics
@@ -42,7 +42,7 @@ jobs:
       max-parallel: 3
       matrix:
         os: [ubuntu-latest] # [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macOS-latest]
-        python_version: ["3.9", "3.10", "3.11", "3.12", "3.13"]
+        python_version: ["3.10", "3.11", "3.12", "3.13", "3.14"]
       fail-fast: false
 
     steps:
@@ -56,10 +56,10 @@ jobs:
         channels: "defaults"
     - name: Install dependencies
       run: |
-        pip install -r requirements.dev
+        pip install ".[dev]"
     - name: Test with pytest
       run: |
-        python setup.py test
+        pytest --cov-report=term --cov-report=xml:coverage.xml --cov=periodicity_detection tests
     - name: Extract test coverage
       if: ${{ matrix.python_version == '3.11' && matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' }}
       run: |
@@ -106,7 +106,7 @@ jobs:
       with:
         use-mamba: true
         auto-update-conda: true
-        python-version: 3.9
+        python-version: "3.10"
         channels: "defaults"
     - name: Build source distribution
       run: |
@@ -117,8 +117,8 @@ jobs:
         name: packages-source
         path: dist
 
-  build-manylinux-wheels:
-    name: Build manylinux wheels
+  build-manylinux-wheel:
+    name: Build manylinux wheel
     if: github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags')
     needs:
       - test
@@ -127,11 +127,9 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
-      - name: Build manylinux Python wheels
-        uses: RalfG/python-wheels-manylinux-build@v0.7.1-manylinux2014_x86_64
-        with:
-          # our wheel is purely python, so this creates a *-none-any.wheel and other versions are not required for now
-          python-versions: 'cp39-cp39m'
+      - name: Build pure-Python wheel
+        run: |
+          python -m pip wheel --no-deps --wheel-dir dist/ .
       - name: List packages
         run: |
           ls -alh dist
@@ -144,7 +142,7 @@ jobs:
   publish:
     name: Publish distributions
     if: github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags')
-    needs: [build-source-distribution, build-manylinux-wheels]
+    needs: [build-source-distribution, build-manylinux-wheel]
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     environment: release
     permissions:

@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ defaults:
 
 jobs:
   check:
-    name: Run checks for periodicity-detection on ubuntu with python 3.9
+    name: Run checks for periodicity-detection
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
@@ -22,14 +22,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           use-mamba: true
           auto-update-conda: true
-          python-version: "3.9"
+          python-version: "3.10"
           channels: "defaults"
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |
-          pip install -r requirements.dev
+          pip install ".[dev]"
       - name: Typcheck with mypy
         run: |
-          python setup.py typecheck
+          mypy periodicity_detection tests
       - name: Lint with flake8
         run: |
           flake8 . --count --show-source --statistics
@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@ jobs:
       max-parallel: 3
       matrix:
         os: [ubuntu-latest] # [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macOS-latest]
-        python_version: ["3.9", "3.13"]
+        python_version: ["3.10", "3.14"]
       fail-fast: false
 
     steps:
@@ -55,10 +55,10 @@ jobs:
         channels: "defaults"
     - name: Install dependencies
       run: |
-        pip install -r requirements.dev
+        pip install ".[dev]"
     - name: Test with pytest
       run: |
-        python setup.py test
+        pytest --cov-report=term --cov-report=xml:coverage.xml --cov=periodicity_detection tests
     - name: Upload Coverage to Codecov
       if: ${{ matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' }}
       uses: codecov/codecov-action@v6

@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ repos:
   - id: mixed-line-ending
     args: [--fix=lf]
 - repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-mypy
-  rev: v0.920
+  rev: v1.9.0
   hooks:
   - id: mypy
     files: periodicity_detection

 # Build documentation in the docs/ directory with Sphinx

-- python >= 3.7, <= 3.11
+- python >= 3.10, <= 3.14
 - pip >= 20

             # our purposes
             # from statsmodels.regression import yule_walker
             # ar, var = yule_walker(x, order=order, demean=False)
-            ar, var, _ = aryule(x, order=order)
-            ar_coeffs.append(ar)
-            ar_vars.append(var)
+            array, variance, _ = aryule(x, order=order)
+            ar_coeffs.append(array)
+            ar_vars.append(variance)
 
         # calculate AICs
         # formula directly taken from R stats-library:
@@ -154,7 +154,7 @@ def _ar_yule_walker(self, x: np.ndarray) -> Tuple[np.ndarray, float, int]:
             axs[0, 0].set_xlabel("order")
             axs[0, 0].set_ylabel("AIC")
             axs[0, 0].legend()
-        return ar, var, order
+        return ar, float(var), int(order)
 
     # TODO: optimize (precomputed LUT for cs and sn?)
     def _spectrum(self, ar: np.ndarray, var: float, order: int) -> np.ndarray:

@@ -1,32 +1,91 @@
-[metadata]
-license_files = {file="LICENSE"}
-
 [build-system]
 requires = ["setuptools"]
 build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"
 
+[project]
+name = "periodicity_detection"
+version = "0.2.0rc2"
+description = "Detect the dominant period in univariate, equidistant time series data."
+authors = [{ name = "Sebastian Schmidl", email = "sebastian.schmidl@hpi.de" }]
+license = "MIT"
+license-files = ["./LICENSE"]
+readme = { content-type = "text/markdown", file = "README.md" }
+classifiers = [
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.13",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.14",
+    "Typing :: Typed",
+    "Topic :: Software Development",
+    "Topic :: Scientific/Engineering",
+    "Intended Audience :: Science/Research",
+    "Intended Audience :: Developers",
+]
+requires-python = ">=3.10"
+dependencies = [
+    "numpy>=1.21.6",
+    "pandas>=1.5.3",
+    "scipy>=1.7.3",
+    "statsmodels>=0.13.5",
+    "spectrum>=0.8",
+    "typing_extensions>=4.7.1",
+    "matplotlib>=3.5.3",
+]
+
+[project.urls]
+source = "https://github.com/SebastianSchmidl/periodicity-detection"
+documentation = "https://periodicity-detection.readthedocs.io"
+
+[project.optional-dependencies]
+dev = [
+    "pytest",
+    "pytest-cov",
+    "mypy==1.9.0",
+    "flake8==5.0.4",
+    "black==23.1",
+    "pre-commit==2.21",
+]
+docs = [
+    "sphinx==5.0.2",
+    "myst-parser==0.18.0",
+    "sphinx_rtd_theme==1.0.0",
+    "sphinx_rtd_dark_mode==1.2.4",
+]
+
+[project.scripts]
+"periodicity" = "periodicity_detection.__main__:cli"
+
 [tool.coverage.run]
 branch = false
 omit = ["**/__main__.py"]
 
 [tool.coverage.report]
-exclude_lines =["pragma: no cover", "raise NotImplementedError", "\\.\\.\\.", "def __repr__", "pass"]
+exclude_lines = [
+    "pragma: no cover",
+    "raise NotImplementedError",
+    "\\.\\.\\.",
+    "def __repr__",
+    "pass",
+]
 #fail_under = 80
-fail_under = 0  # for testing purposes
+fail_under = 0      # for testing purposes
 skip_covered = true
 sort = "Cover"
 
 [tool.black]
-target-version = ['py39']
+target-version = ['py310']
 
 [tool.isort]
-py_version = "39"
-profile = "black" # Play nicely with black
+py_version = "310"
+profile = "black"                              # Play nicely with black
 src_paths = ["periodicity_detection", "tests"]
 
 [tool.mypy]
-python_version = "3.9"
+python_version = "3.10"
 show_error_codes = true
+pretty = true
 
 [[tool.mypy.overrides]]
 module = [
@@ -35,6 +94,6 @@ module = [
     "pandas.*",
     "statsmodels.*",
     "scipy.*",
-    "spectrum.*"
+    "spectrum.*",
 ]
 ignore_missing_imports = true
